description: India Book III,10: Letter from Khalaf b. Yiṣḥaq in Aden to Avraham Ibn Yiju in Dahbattan on the Malabar coast. Goitein dated the letter to after 1139, Friedman to after 1138. The letter contains much information on commercial business and the report of a shipwreck in Bāb al-Mandab.
tags: trade, IB3, India, Ibn Yiju, Shipwreck
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מעדן ל-Dahbattan. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
